items.line_en: And Jesus is the only one who can bring true and full joy to our heart.

coach.say: And Jesus is the only one who can bring true and full joy to our heart.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And Jesus is the only one who can bring true and / full joy to our heart.
Chunk it: A full joy.

items.line_en: Not just a happy for one day, but a deep happy feeling.

coach.say: Not just a happy for one day, but a deep happy feeling.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Not just a happy for one day, / but a deep happy feeling.
Chunk it: Yes.
Chunk it: A joy that is complete.

items.line_en: So when your heart is sad, talk to God, pray.

coach.say: So when your heart is sad, talk to God, pray.
coach.hint: Chunk it: So when your heart is sad, / talk to God, / pray.

items.line_en: It is the best medicine for the heart.

coach.say: It is the best medicine for the heart.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It is the best medicine for the heart.

items.line_en: That is a wonderful advice, Paul.

coach.say: That is a wonderful advice, Paul.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That is a wonderful advice, / Paul.
Chunk it: Thank you for sharing that.

items.line_en: It is about taking care of our whole self.

coach.say: It is about taking care of our whole self.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It is about taking care of our whole self.
Chunk it: Yes.
Chunk it: Exactly.
Chunk it: Our body and / our spirit.

items.line_en: Well, this was a fantastic conversation.

coach.say: Well, this was a fantastic conversation.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Well, / this was a fantastic conversation.

items.line_en: So very helpful in many ways.

coach.say: So very helpful in many ways.
coach.hint: Chunk it: So very helpful in many ways.
Chunk it: I agree, / Emily.

items.line_en: And a big thank you to all of our wonderful listeners for joining us today.

coach.say: And a big thank you to all of our wonderful listeners for joining us today.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And a big thank you to all of our wonderful listeners for joining us today.
Chunk it: Yes.
Chunk it: Thank you, / everyone.

items.line_en: We hope this episode was helpful for you.

coach.say: We hope this episode was helpful for you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We hope this episode was helpful for you.

items.line_en: We would love to hear from you.

coach.say: We would love to hear from you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We would love to hear from you.
Chunk it: Please leave a comment below.

items.line_en: What is a new word you learned today?

coach.say: What is a new word you learned today?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What is a new word you learned today?
Chunk it: Ah, / that's a great question.

items.line_en: Maybe appointment or headache or prescription.

coach.say: Maybe appointment or headache or prescription.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Maybe appointment or headache or / prescription.
Chunk it: Let us know.

items.line_en: And don't forget to subscribe to Mr. English Channel.

coach.say: And don't forget to subscribe to Mr. English Channel.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And don't forget to subscribe to Mr. / English Channel.

items.line_en: And please share this episode with your friends and family.

coach.say: And please share this episode with your friends and family.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And please share this episode with your friends and / family.
Chunk it: Sharing is caring.
Chunk it: It is.
Chunk it: Thanks again for listening, / everyone.

items.line_en: We will see you in the next episode.

coach.say: We will see you in the next episode.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We will see you in the next episode.
Chunk it: Bye for now.
Chunk it: Be healthy and / happy.
